Name: UConsoleSettings
Description: Implements the settings for the UConsole class.

Variables.Name: ManualAutoCompleteList
Variables.Description: Manual list of auto-complete commands and info specified in BaseInput.ini

Variables.Name: AutoCompleteMapPaths
Variables.Description: List of relative paths (e.g. ContentMaps) to search for map names for auto-complete usage. Specified in BaseInput.ini.

Variables.Name: BackgroundOpacityPercentage
Variables.Description: Amount of transparency of the console background.

Variables.Name: bOrderTopToBottom
Variables.Description: Whether we legacy bottom-to-top ordering or regular top-to-bottom ordering

Variables.Name: InputColor
Variables.Description: The color used for text input.

Variables.Name: HistoryColor
Variables.Description: The color used for the previously typed commands history.

Variables.Name: AutoCompleteCommandColor
Variables.Description: The autocomplete color used for executable commands.

Variables.Name: AutoCompleteCVarColor
Variables.Description: The autocomplete color used for mutable CVars.

Variables.Name: AutoCompleteFadedColor
Variables.Description: The autocomplete color used for command descriptions and read-only CVars.
